work_performed: Concrete pour Level 27 east core walls 180 CY. Curtain wall installation Level 19-21 south and west faces 22 panels. Interior rough framing Level 12-13 corridor walls and unit demising. MEP rough-in Level 11 units 1101-1140. Window washing staging removed Level 8-9 per unit closeout. 224 workers on site.
delays: Temperature hold 7:00-9:30 AM - heated enclosure verified before pour

work_performed: Level 27 core walls stripped and shored. PT slab Level 26 pour scheduled. Curtain wall Level 22-24 north face 18 panels. Residential finishes Level 8 painting and tile installation. MEP trim Level 8 units started. Elevator cab delivery accepted Level 1 staging. 218 workers on site.

Snow - curtain wall suspended per wind and temperature protocol. Interior work only. Level 8-10 residential finishes advancing - flooring tile painting. Core wall rebar Level 28 started. PT slab Level 26 forms shored and PT stressed - ready for pour. 189 workers on site.
delays: Curtain wall suspended 7:00 AM - resume pending weather - 1 day delay recorded

work_performed: Foundation excavation started Level 1 west wing. Soil nail installation grid A-F rows 1-8. Structural concrete Level 2 east wing 400 CY slab on grade. Rebar placement Level 3 east wing started. ICRA inspection Level 2 corridor expansion - passed. 148 workers on site.

Soil nail Level 1 grid G-L rows 1-8 complete. Rebar Level 3 east wing 70% placed. MEP coordination meeting - resolved 3 BIM conflicts Level 3 and 4. Owner walk-through Level 2 east wing progress with Beatrice Oyelaran and Frank Moreno. ICRA anterooms Level 2 north complete and operational. 152 workers on site.

Level 3 east concrete pour 320 CY. MEP rough-in Level 2 east - medical gas piping 60% placed. Drywall framing Level 2 ICU zone starting. Structural steel Level 1 west wing columns and beams erected - 8 columns set. Biomedical equipment planning walkthrough OR suite locations with hospital team. 158 workers on site.
safety_incidents: Minor first aid - worker cut on conduit edge on left forearm - treated returned to work

work_performed: GMP development meeting with Western Pacific Gaming LLC - reviewed structural systems trade-off study for casino floor. Presented concrete vs. post-tensioned options. Gaming floor FF value requirements discussed. Nevada State Fire Marshal pre-application conference scheduled for March 2026. Site survey complete - delivered to structural engineer. 8 office staff on site.

Geotechnical investigation complete - boring logs received. Soils report shows competent bearing at 18 feet for mat foundation. Civil engineer designing site utility plan. Value engineering session with owner - reviewed F&B outlet count from 8 to 6 as cost reduction. Pre-construction schedule submitted to owner - GMP target June 1 2026. 6 office staff on site.

Punchlist inspection Building 2 - floors 1-3 office area with CenterPoint and tenant reps. 48 punchlist items identified - 31 already corrected during walk. Dock leveler final adjustments doors 180-210. LED lighting commissioning east half building complete - all zones tested and accepted. ESFR sprinkler final inspection east half - passed. 42 workers on site.

Punchlist Items 1-31 corrections verified and accepted by CenterPoint. Remaining 17 items in progress. Dock leveler final adjustment doors 211-240 complete. Stormwater pond final grading and seed. LEED documentation final submittal package being assembled. Tenant move-in coordination call - target January 28 2026 for 50% of building. 38 workers on site.

Punchlist items 32-48 complete and verified. CenterPoint issued Substantial Completion letter pending 2 final items - life safety certificate and LEED submittal. Tenant occupancy permit filed with City of Memphis. Final as-built drawings submitted. Substantial completion target January 20 2026. 28 workers on site.

Concrete slab on grade pour Zone B gymnasium and fitness area 280 CY. Structural steel erection community rooms and entry canopy - 6 columns 12 beams set. MEP underground rough-in 80% complete - final sections pool mechanical room. Architect review visit - confirmed exterior skin design. Geothermal bore drilling 28 of 64 bores complete. 94 workers on site.

Structural steel erection community rooms complete. Geothermal bore drilling 36 of 64 bores. MEP underground pool mechanical room rough-in complete - ready for inspection. Concrete slab cure Zone B - no pour. Colorado prevailing wage payroll reports submitted on schedule. Exterior masonry block foundation walls starting north and east facades. 98 workers on site.

Snow - limited exterior work. Geothermal drilling suspended. Interior concrete work continued - slab Zone A fitness center 180 CY. MEP inspection underground pool mechanical - passed. Structural drawings review meeting - resolved skylight structural support question. 72 workers on site.
safety_incidents: Minor near-miss - slip on icy exterior walkway before salt application - no injury
